title: Cat Creepers
body:
Cat-Styled Creepers!

Based off the amazing art from @diadraws on tumblr!

Remodeled Creepers to be more cat-like with custom animations and biome variants!

Tutorial

Due to OptiFine having inconsistent updates and features, its recommended to use mods: EMF & ETF instead

If using OptiFine, make sure to enable these settings for complete features:

Video Settings -> Quality -> Custom Entity Models: ON
Random Entities -> ON
Emissive Textures -> ON
In order to prevent texture issues, Cat Creepers should be at the TOP of your Resource Pack list.

Credits

Used in Screenshots:
Shaders: Complementary-reimagined
